ios.title: Install on iPhone/iPad:

ios.step2: 2. Scroll down and tap Add to Home Screen
ios.step3: 3. Tap Add in the top right corner
ios.hint: On iOS 26+, any website can be installed as a full PWA!

generic.title: To install SoundWave:
generic.chromeEdge: Chrome/Edge: Click the install icon in the address bar, or Menu > Install SoundWave

pwaSettings.requirements: Requirements: HTTPS connection, valid manifest, service worker

clearAllDialog.title: Clear All Offline Data?
clearAllDialog.description: This will remove all cached playlists and free up storage space. You'll need to re-download playlists to use them offline.

errors.clearAllFailed: Failed to clear all offline data

empty.title: No playlists cached for offline use

delete.title: Delete User?
delete.warning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone! The following will be deleted:

smartPlaylists.title: Smart Playlists
smartPlaylists.description: Dynamic playlists that automatically update based on rules. Your library changes, they update instantly.

createDialog.title: Create Smart Playlist
createDialog.name: Name
createDialog.info: Smart playlists automatically update when your library changes. You can refine rules after creation.

messages.noRulesWarning: No rules set - playlist will include all tracks. Add rules after creation to filter.

recently_added.name: ✨ Recently Added
recently_added.description: Tracks added in the last 30 days

not_played_recently.name: 🕰️ Rediscover
not_played_recently.description: Tracks you haven't played in over 60 days

never_played.name: 🆕 Never Played
never_played.description: Tracks you haven't listened to yet

dialog.noRulesDefined: No rules defined. All tracks will be included.

empty.title: Queue is empty
empty.description: Add songs to start a queue

pwa.installDescription: Install the app for faster access and offline playback
pwa.updateDescription: A new version of SoundWave is ready to install

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the look and feel of SoundWave with different color themes.

visualizer.title: Audio Visualizer
visualizer.description: Choose a visualization style for the audio player. Different themes offer unique animations and color schemes.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account. You'll need to enter a code from your authenticator app when you sign in.

setupDialog.title: Enable Two-Factor Authentication
setupDialog.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
setupDialog.enterCodeToVerify: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to verify:
setupDialog.saveBackupCodesWarning: Save these backup codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.

disableDialog.title: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
disableDialog.warning: Disabling two-factor authentication will make your account less secure.
disableDialog.enterCode: Enter a verification code from your authenticator app or use a backup code:

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Create API keys for external dashboard widgets (like Homepage). Keys are compatible with TubeArchivist widget format.
apiKeys.saveKeyCaption: This key will only be shown once. Copy it now!

createDialog.title: Create API Key
createDialog.description: Create an API key for external dashboard widgets. This key will allow read-only access to your statistics.
createDialog.copyWarning: The API key will only be shown once after creation. Make sure to copy it!

deleteDialog.title: Delete API Key?
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this API key? Any applications using this key will lose access.

smartShuffle.title: Smart Shuffle
smartShuffle.description: When enabled, shuffle mode will avoid playing recently heard songs, creating a more varied listening experience.
smartShuffle.historySizeHelp: Number of recently played songs to avoid when shuffling

seekDuration.title: Seek Duration
seekDuration.description: Choose how many seconds to skip forward or backward when using seek controls (media keys, headphones, etc.).

prefetch.title: Intelligent Prefetch & Caching
prefetch.description: Automatically download upcoming tracks for instant playback. Cached tracks play without network delay.

sync.title: Cross-Device Playback Sync
sync.description: Sync playback position across devices. Disable to reduce battery and data usage on mobile.

lyrics.title: Lyrics
lyrics.description: Automatically fetch and cache synchronized lyrics for your audio files using LRCLIB API.

userManagement.description: Manage all users in the system. Create, edit, or delete user accounts and monitor system statistics.

alerts.apiKeyCreated: API key created! Copy it now - it will only be shown once.
alerts.backupCodesUnavailable: For your security, backup codes can only be saved when generated. Use "Regenerate Codes" to create and download a new set.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your app language. New features are translated and your choice is remembered on this device.
language.label: App language

tooltips.selectFilesHint: Select individual audio files from your device
tooltips.selectFolderHttps: Folder selection requires HTTPS or localhost. Currently viewing over HTTP. Use "Select Files" instead, or access via HTTPS.
tooltips.selectFolderHint: Select a folder to scan recursively including all subfolders

alerts.noFilesDescription: Click "Select Files" to choose individual audio files (works everywhere), or "Select Folder" to scan an entire folder including subfolders (requires HTTPS or localhost). Files are stored in your browser and play locally without uploading.
alerts.folderNotSupported: Folder selection not supported in this browser. Use Chrome, Edge, or Opera.
alerts.folderRequiresHttps: Folder selection requires HTTPS or localhost. For local network access, use "Select Files" instead or access via HTTPS.
alerts.noAudioFiles: No audio files found in the selected folder

confirmations.removeFile: Remove this file from your library?
confirmations.removeAllFiles: Remove ALL files from your library? This cannot be undone.

forcePasswordChange.title: Set a new password
forcePasswordChange.subtitle: For your security, you must change the default password before continuing.
forcePasswordChange.hint: Use at least {{count}} characters. Avoid common or reused passwords.

errors.fillAllFields: Please fill in all password fields
errors.tooShort: Password must be at least {{count}} characters long
errors.sameAsCurrent: New password must be different from the current password

passwordPolicy.tooShort: Password is too short. Use at least 8 characters.
passwordPolicy.tooCommon: This password is too common. Choose a less predictable one.
passwordPolicy.tooSimilar: Password is too similar to your username or email.
passwordPolicy.sameAsCurrent: New password must be different from your current password.
passwordPolicy.invalid: Password does not meet the security requirements.

emailVerification.success: Your email address has been confirmed.
emailVerification.pendingNotice: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Your address will change once you confirm it.

errors.expired: This confirmation link has expired. Please request the change again.
errors.invalid: This confirmation link is invalid or has already been used.
errors.emailTaken: That email address is already in use.
errors.generic: We couldn't confirm your email. Please try again.

dialog.title: Update available
dialog.noNotes: See the release notes on GitHub.
